---
---

## Slide 1 - Classed div

::: {.my-class}
Some text in a classed div
:::

## Slide 2 - Callout

::: {.callout-note}
A note callout
:::

## Slide 3 - Columns

::: {.columns}
::: {.column width="50%"}
Left column
:::
::: {.column width="50%"}
Right column
:::
:::

## Slide 4 - Multiple divs with different classes

::: {.first-class}
First div
:::

::: {.second-class}
Second div
:::

## Slide 5 - Two divs with the same class

::: {.shared-class}
First instance of shared-class
:::

::: {.shared-class}
Second instance of shared-class
:::

## Slide 6 - Same class as slide 1 (cross-slide isolation)

::: {.my-class}
This is on a different slide than the other .my-class div
:::

## Slide 7 - Id-keyed div

::: {#my-special-id}
Content keyed by id, no class
:::
